description: Flash-inspired single-page template with smooth horizontal slide transitions
author: Artist Sites

custom_fields.label: Hero Section Title
custom_fields.help_text: Main title displayed on your landing hero section

custom_fields.label: Hero Section Description
custom_fields.placeholder: Explore my collection of contemporary artworks...
custom_fields.help_text: Description text displayed below the hero title

custom_fields.label: Hero Button Text
custom_fields.help_text: Text for the optional call-to-action button (leave empty to hide button)

custom_fields.label: Hero Button URL
custom_fields.help_text: URL or anchor link for the button (e.g., #gallery, /shop, or external URL)

custom_fields.label: Hero Background Color
custom_fields.help_text: Background color for the hero section

custom_fields.label: Hero Focus Image URL
custom_fields.help_text: Main hero image displayed prominently (recommended: 1200x800px or larger)

custom_fields.label: Mobile Layout Behavior
custom_fields.description: How the template behaves on mobile devices
